title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Safestyle Windows And Doors Ltd
body: "Application number 5429  Applicant Ashi Group Limited objected to the name used by Safestyle Windows And Doors Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 17 October 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Safestyle Windows And Doors Ltd is changed to 16304085, Ltd. "
